# Runtime Flows

> **Scope**: Runtime execution paths including plugin discovery, validation, registration, and activation.
> **Confidence**: Low
> **Last updated**: 2026-05-16
> **Source entries**: OBS-000

- ❓ Startup flow loads module configuration and plugin manifests.
- ❓ Validation flow enforces contract compatibility before registration.
- ❓ Activation flow enables plugins in deterministic order.
- ❓ Failure flow isolates plugin faults and preserves host stability.
